silence: That is okay! Take your time. What is one thing you see in your story?
No rush! Can you tell me one thing about your character?
It is okay to think slowly. What color is something in your story?
hesitation: You are doing great! What is the first thing that comes to your mind?
There is no wrong answer! What does your character want to do?
Even a tiny idea is perfect! What does your character see right now?
short_answer: Oh I love it! What happens after that?
Wow! And then what does your character do?
Cool! What does it look like there?
repetition: Yes! And now something surprising happens — what is it?
I love that part! What if a new friend shows up?
Amazing! What happens next that nobody expects?
excitement: Yes yes yes! Keep going, what happens next?!
I love your energy! What does your character do now?
So exciting! What is the most fun part coming up?
exploration: Ooh interesting! What does your character find?
I like it! What does your character want most right now?
Great thinking! What is the biggest problem your hero has to solve?
confidence: You are an amazing storyteller! How does the story end?
Wow so good! How does your character change at the end?
Brilliant! What is the message of your story?
long_answer: You have such a big imagination! What is the most exciting part?
I love your story! What does your character decide to do?
So good! How does the adventure continue?
